VectorStudio

Local raster-to-vector workspace

Image to SVG Converter

Convert PNG, JPEG, BMP, and TIFF assets into SVG files with automatic asset detection, stable previews, and browser-safe export behavior.

Detects logo, photo, drawing, or line art
Protects browser-safe conversion limits
Exports traced vector SVG output

Prepare an Asset

Upload an image and VectorStudio will choose the closest tracing profile before conversion.

Drag and drop images here

PNG, JPEG, BMP, or TIFF supported

Presets

No asset loaded Upload an image to apply an automatic profile.
